entries.content: Task started: Generate large paragraphs of text in your though process , write a comprehensive 2000-word detailed architectural document of transformer, and then TASK 2:  search for top movies and write e1000 words each for each describing the plot of each movie

Thought: The user has requested two major tasks: 1) a 2000-word architectural document on transformers, and 2) 1000-word plot descriptions for top movies. Given the strict constraints of 10 LLM calls and a $0.20 budget, I must prioritize efficiency. The web_search tool is the only viable method to gather external information for both tasks. I will first address Task 1 by searching for authoritative transformer architecture documentation to extract key components (e.g., attention mechanisms, positional encoding). Task 2 will require identifying "top movies" via web_search and then retrieving plot details, but I must balance this against remaining call/budget limits.
